# Feature Request

## Feature Idea

Describe the feature.

## Why It Helps Game Development

Explain how it improves game planning, design, programming, UI/UX, art, sound, QA, playtesting, or publishing.

## Which Role It Affects

- Producer
- Game Designer
- Programmer
- UI/UX Designer
- Art Director
- Sound Designer
- QA Tester
- Ruthless Playtester
- Publishing / Showcase Consultant

## Suggested Files to Update

List likely files.

## Example Prompt

```txt
$game-dev-studio
...
```
